_note: Complete Barrio Builders seed — generated from onboarding session May 31, 2026. Run seed-barrio.sql in Supabase to insert.

website_config.hero_title: Built for Tucson. Built to Last.
website_config.hero_subtitle: From remodels to new floors, Barrio Builders brings quality craftsmanship and honest work to every Tucson home and business. Hablamos Español.
website_config.about_text: We're not a national chain — we're your neighbors. Barrio Builders serves Tucson families with quality remodeling, construction, and finishing work that stands the test of time. When you hire us, you get a crew that cares about your home as much as you do.

services.name: Remodeling
services.description: From kitchen transformations to full home remodels, we handle every detail with craftsmanship that shows for years to come.

services.name: Renovations
services.description: Breathe new life into any space. We renovate with quality materials and an eye for detail that comes through in every finish.

services.name: Painting
services.description: Interior or exterior, our crews deliver clean lines and lasting color that makes your property look its best.

services.name: Drywall
services.description: Smooth, seamless installation and repair. We prep it right so every wall is perfect — no shortcuts, ever.

services.name: Framing
services.description: Strong bones make a strong home. Our framing is precise, code-compliant, and built to last for decades.

services.name: Flooring
services.description: From hardwood to tile, we install flooring that looks beautiful and holds up to real Tucson life.

testimonials.name: Maria Gonzalez
testimonials.quote: Barrio Builders remodeled our kitchen and we couldn't be happier. Professional, clean, and they finished on time. 100% recommended.

testimonials.name: Tom Richards
testimonials.quote: They replaced my entire roof after the monsoon season. Fair price, great work, and they kept me updated the whole time.

testimonials.name: Rosa & Daniel Peralta
testimonials.quote: Hablamos con el equipo de Barrio Builders y desde el principio nos sentimos en confianza. El trabajo quedó perfecto.
